---
title: "12. иЃљж•ЈдёЋжµЃйЂљ"
subtitle: "Gathering, Dispersal, and Information Flow"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 12
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How gathering, dispersal, blockage, source depth, penetration, and open exchange map flow onto information channels, compression, and hierarchical transmission."
---

**Hexagrams:** жЇ”(8), еќЋ(29), е§¤(44), иђѓ(45), е›°(47), дє•(48), е·Ѕ(57), е…‘(58), ж¶Ј(59)  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion`, `fold operator`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
